annotations.note: Mathlib's `round` rounds to nearest integer (Mathlib/Algebra/Order/Round.lean) but has no rounding-to-n-significant-digits operator.

annotations.label: Round half away from zero

anchor.snippet: If the n + 1 digit is 5 not followed by other digits

annotations.note: Mathlib defines `round x = ⌊x + 1/2⌋` (round-half-up), which is related to but distinct from round-half-away-from-zero for negative numbers.
